<?php namespace PayPalHttp; /** * Class HttpRequest * @package PayPalHttp * * Request object that holds all the necessary information required by HTTPClient * * @see HttpClient */ class HttpRequest { /** * @var string */ public $path; /** * @var array | string */ public $body; /** * @var string */ public $verb; /** * @var array */ public $headers; function __construct($path, $verb) { $this->path = $path; $this->verb = $verb; $this->body = NULL; $this->headers = []; } }
